name: Doctor Who: The Doctors Revisited
overview: As the Doctor's newest companion, Clara Oswald, steps into the TARDIS, take a look back at previous companions that have won over The Doctor's hearts in Doctor Who: The Companions. Along the way, companions past and present talk about how the show has changed their lives, and how they've never quite managed to leave the TARDIS behind.

trailers.title: Doctor Who: The Doctors Revisited - The Origin of The Iconic Scarf
